title: roldana michoacana
intro: Roldana michoacana, also known as Mexican mountain mint or mountain mint, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Roldana michoacana include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it can also be used as a natural remedy for various health issues.
